label: Weather commonality record
description: Associates a WeatherDef with a relative commonality weight for biome weather selection. The XML element name is the WeatherDef defName; scalar text is the commonality.

weather.label: Weather
weather.description: WeatherDef this record applies to. Populated from the XML element name by the keyedObjectList loader.

commonality.label: Commonality
commonality.description: Relative weight controlling how often this weather type occurs. Populated from XML scalar text by the keyedObjectList loader.
